news.headline: WSP and Microsoft form 7-year partnership to digitize AEC industry, with over $1 billion investment.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Montreal, WSP Global Inc. (TSX: WSP) and Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) revealed a multi-year global partnership to enhance digitalization within the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) sector. This collaboration, spanning 7 years, involves a financial commitment and investment that could surpass $1 billion. WSP, a prominent professional services firm in engineering and science, teamed up with technology giant Microsoft to drive innovation and advancement in the AEC industry through digital solutions.

news.headline: Abcourt finds 41.6 g/t Gold over 0.7m in 785N zone, appoints new director at Sleeping Giant Mine. TSX Venture: ABI.
news.summary: Abcourt Mines Inc. based in Rouyn-Noranda, Quebec, shared the outcomes of initial holes drilled as part of their program aimed at tapping into the deep mining potential of the Sleeping Giant mine. The Corporation, listed on TSX Venture as ABI and OTCQB as ABMBF, disclosed this information on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: Inventus Mining finds gold mineralization 18m below the surface in the Pardo Gold Project's initial drill results.
First Helium Inc. finishes drilling 7-15 well at Worsley Property in Northern Alberta, plans to test 7-30 and 7-15 wells.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 13, 2025, First Helium Inc. revealed the completion of drilling activities at its 7-15 exploration well located at the Worsley Property in Northern Alberta. The company, traded as TSXV: HELI, OTCQB: FHELF, and FRA: 2MC, announced that the 7-15 well has been cased for completion and testing. Moving forward, First Helium plans to finalize and conduct testing on both the 7-30 and 7-15 wells.

news.headline: First Advantage Corp (NASDAQ: FA) will release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on Feb 27, 2025 at 8:30am ET.
news.summary: Atlanta-based First Advantage Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as FA, announced that it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 27, 2025. The report will be published before the company's earnings conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. First Advantage is recognized as a prominent global provider of employment background screening, identity, and verification services.

news.headline: InspireMD and NAMSA partner on CGuardians II clinical trial of CGuard Prime 80 cm Carotid Stent System for TCAR, aimed to prevent stroke.
news.summary: InspireMD, Inc. and NAMSA have revealed their collaboration in conducting the CGUARDIANS II pivotal study for the CGuard Prime™ 80 cm carotid stent system aimed at preventing stroke from carotid stenosis. This partnership, part of a strategic outsourcing agreement, involves NAMSA, a prominent MedTech Contract Research Organization, and InspireMD (NSPR on Nasdaq), the developer of the innovative stent. The study focuses on utilizing the stent in Transcarotid Artery Revascularization (TCAR) procedures. This initiative signals a significant step forward in the field of stroke prevention and marks a crucial milestone for both companies.

news.headline: Major Drilling will report Q3 results for fiscal 2025 on March 7 at 8:00am EST through a webcast/conference call.
news.summary: A webcast/conference call will be hosted by management on March 7, 2025, at 8:00 am EST. This communication session serves as an opportunity for the organization to interact with stakeholders and share important updates and insights regarding its operations and strategies. Participants are encouraged to attend this event to gain a better understanding of the company's performance and future direction. Save the date and time to ensure you do not miss out on valuable information.

news.headline: Flagship Communities REIT to hold conference call for Q4 2024 results.
news.summary: New data shows that the current unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.9%, with over 12 million individuals currently out of work. Experts are attributing this increase to the ongoing economic downturn caused by the global pandemic. Additionally, the latest GDP report indicates a 4.8% contraction in the economy, reflecting the challenges faced by businesses and workers in the current climate. These figures highlight the significant impact of the crisis on the labor market and overall economic stability.

news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Concurrent Technologies Plc to OTCQX, trading 12,000 securities. CNC now trades on OTCQX (COTGF) upgraded from OTC Pink.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Concurrent Technologies Plc (LSE: CNC; OTCQX: COTGF), a company specializing in designing and producing cutting-edge computer products, systems, and mission-critical solutions for high-performance markets, has met the requirements to be listed on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. operates regulated markets where 12,000 U.S. and international securities are traded. Concurrent Technologies Plc transitioned to the OTCQX from the Pink® market.

news.headline: Nutriband and Kindeva Drug Delivery team up for exclusive partnership on Aversa™ Fentanyl patch to deter abuse.
Penske Automotive Group's Q4 revenue reaches $7.7 billion, a 6% increase. Same-store retail service revenue rises 7%.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, revenue saw a 6% rise, reaching a record high of $7.7 billion. Same-store retail automotive service and parts revenue exhibited a 7% increase, with related gross profit up by 9%. Notably, selling, general, and administrative expenses decreased by 70 basis points to 70.3% of gross profit in Q4. Earnings before taxes in this period...

news.headline: AEP reports 2024 earnings of $5.60/share (GAAP), $5.62/share (operating), 7% increase. 2025 guidance: $5.75-$5.95/share.
news.summary: In 2024, the GAAP earnings per share stood at $5.60, while operating earnings per share were $5.62, marking a 7% rise from the previous year. The 2025 operating earnings (non-GAAP) guidance is confirmed to fall within the range of $5.75 to $5.95 per share. The company anticipates a long-term EPS growth rate ranging between 6% to 8%. Additionally, they aim for a FFO/Debt target of 14%.

news.headline: Global Payments (NYSE: GPN) announced Q4 and full year 2024 results, for the year ended Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Global Payments Inc. revealed its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as GPN, announced these figures in Atlanta.

news.headline: Join VF Corporation on March 6, 2025 for their Investor Day event.
BingX Labs invests $10M in StakeStone for omnichain liquidity solutions development.
news.summary: In Panama City on February 13, 2025, BingX Labs, a branch of the cryptocurrency exchange BingX, has invested $10 million in StakeStone. This funding aims to expedite the progress of omnichain liquidity staking and StakingFi applications. BingX Labs' contribution to StakeStone will enhance the development of these technologies, emphasizing their commitment to innovation in the cryptocurrency sector.

news.headline: Industrial Cleaning Services Market to grow by USD 18.9 billion (6% CAGR) from 2025-2029, driven by workplace wellness & sustainability, AI transformation.
news.summary: A recent report delving into the influence of AI on market dynamics has projected substantial growth for the industrial cleaning services sector. The market is anticipated to increase by approximately USD 18.9 billion between 2025 and 2029. This growth is expected to be consistent, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Ryder named one of Canada's Best Employers in 2025 by Forbes, marking the first time included in the list.
news.summary: Ryder System, Inc. (NYSE: R) has been honored by Forbes as one of Canada's Best Employers in 2025. This recognition is a significant milestone for the company, known for its expertise in supply chain and transportation services. It is the first time Ryder has been featured on Forbes' list of top Canadian employers. The award, done in partnership with Statista, a prominent statistics portal and industry ranking provider, highlights Ryder's commitment to its employees. Forbes and Statista meticulously selected 300 organizations for this prestigious accolade.

news.headline: Vice Admiral Timothy White joins Academy Securities' Advisory Board and Geopolitical Intelligence Group after 30 years in Navy.
news.summary: Academy Securities, the first investment bank in the US owned and operated by Post-9/11 veterans, has named Vice Admiral Timothy White to its Advisory Board and Geopolitical Intelligence Group. Vice Admiral White, a retired member of the United States Navy as of 2020, brings over 30 years of experience in cyber warfare, signals intelligence, and information operations. During his tenure, he served as the Commander of US Fleet Cyber Command.

news.headline: Granite Construction (NYSE: GVA) reported Q4 2024 net income of $41 million, $0.84 per share, compared to $26 million in prior year. Adjusted net income $56 million, $1.23 per share, compared to $38 million.
news.summary: Granite Construction Inc. (NYSE: GVA) has revealed its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. In Q4 2024, the company reported a net income of $41 million, equivalent to $0.84 per diluted share. This marks a significant increase from the previous year's net income of $26 million or $0.55 per diluted share. Additionally, the adjusted net income for Q4 2024 amounted to $56 million, or $1.23 per diluted share, demonstrating a notable rise from the adjusted net income of $38 million, or $0.85 per diluted share, for the same period in the prior year.

news.headline: CBRE Group, Inc. (NYSE:CBRE) reports Q4: GAAP EPS $1.58; Core EPS $2.32; 2024: GAAP EPS $3.14; Core EPS $5.10. Revenue: Q4 up 16%, 2024 up 12%. Resilient Business net revenue up 16% Q4, 14% in 2024. $1.7 billion net cash flow from operations in 2024.
news.summary: CBRE Group, Inc. released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter, they reported a GAAP EPS of $1.58 and a Core EPS of $2.32. For the entire year of 2024, the GAAP EPS was $3.14 and the Core EPS was $5.10. Revenue saw a 16% increase in Q4 and a 12% increase for the year 2024, with net revenue rising by 18% in Q4 and 14% for the year. Their Resilient Business segment experienced a 16% increase in net revenue for Q4 and a 14% increase for the entirety of 2024. The company generated $1.7 billion in net cash flow from operations and $1.5 billion in free cash flow throughout 2024.

news.headline: Hyatt Hotels Corp. (NYSE: H) reported Q4 2024 results: 5.0% RevPAR growth, 2.9% Net Package RevPAR growth, 7.8% net rooms growth.
news.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation released its fourth quarter and full year 2024 results today, reporting strong performance. In the fourth quarter, comparable system-wide hotels saw a 5.0% increase in RevPAR, while for the entire year of 2024, the growth stood at 4.6% compared to 2023. Additionally, comparable system-wide all-inclusive resorts experienced a Net Package RevPAR growth of 2.9% in the fourth quarter and 4.4% for the full year of 2024. The company also achieved a net rooms growth of 7.8% during the same period.

news.headline: Trump: Good possibility of ending the horrible war in Ukraine
Supplementary cementitious materials market set to grow by $14.27B from 2025-2029, driven by AI and construction activities.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the significant impact of AI on market transformation, particularly in the supplementary cementitious materials sector. Projections show the market is expected to increase by a substantial USD 14.27 billion between 2025 and 2029. This growth is anticipated to advance steadily at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 8.8%.

news.headline: TELUS Corp. declares $0.4023 per share dividend payable on April 1, 2025 to shareholders of record on March.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 13th, 2025, the Board of Directors announced a quarterly dividend of $0.4023 per share for Common shares. The dividend is set to be paid on April 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on March.

news.headline: Iron Mountain raises dividend by 10% to $0.785 per share; payable on Apr 4, 2025 to shareholders of record on Mar 17, 2025.
news.summary: The Board of Directors of Iron Mountain Incorporated announced a 10% increase in the quarterly cash dividend to $0.785 per share of common stock. Shareholders of record at the close of business on March 17, 2025, will receive the dividend payable on April 4, 2025. The company, a global leader in information management services, attributes this decision to its strong performance in 2024 and positive growth projections.

news.headline: watchTowr is expanding leadership with strategic appointments to accelerate growth in meeting demand from Fortune 500 and critical infrastructure, hiring Global VP Commercial and VP Marketing to tackle cyber threats.
news.summary: WatchTowr, a cybersecurity firm revolutionizing External Attack Surface Management, has revealed key leadership additions to drive global expansion. Gregory Lingris has been appointed as the Global VP of Commercial, while Alice Collins has taken on the role of VP of Marketing. The company aims to address the rising cyber threats targeting critical infrastructure and Fortune 500 firms. Their approach, distinct from mere "security theater," has attracted significant attention.

news.headline: Iron Mountain (NYSE: IRM) reports record results for Q4 and full year 2024 with all-time high Revenue, Adjusted EBITDA, and AFFO.
news.summary: Iron Mountain Incorporated, a prominent player in information management services, has disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and the entire year of 2024. The company, listed as IRM on NYSE, achieved record-breaking figures for Revenue, Adjusted EBITDA, and AFFO during this period. This is attributed to the successful implementation of the Project Matterhorn growth strategy. Notably, their revenue saw a double-digit increase in Q4, showcasing robust performance across all segments of their business.

news.headline: TELUS Digital reports stable performance in Q4 and full-year 2024, controlled by TELUS Corporation. Figures in USD.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, TELUS Digital Experience (TIXT) has unveiled its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. TELUS Corporation (T, TU) is the majority shareholder of TELUS Digital. The results are presented in U.S. dollars. The company focuses on creating exceptional customer experiences through a blend of data, technology, and a human-centered approach.

news.headline: Infobip signs EU contract for global communications platform, boosting Europe's competitiveness.
news.summary: In Croatia, Infobip has recently announced their participation in a European Union-led project aimed at developing a cutting-edge worldwide communication platform. The company has formally agreed to the contract and will be actively involved in this initiative. This move signifies a major step forward in the advancement of global communication technologies.

news.headline: 2024 results released by DNOW for Q4 and full year with profit and revenue figures.
US Foods' Q4 fiscal 2024: Total case volume up 3.5%, net sales $9.5B, gross profit $1.7B, net income $66M, EBITDA $441M.
news.summary: US Foods Holding Corp, a prominent foodservice distributor in the US, released its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2024 from Rosemont, Illinois. Notable figures from the fourth quarter include a 3.5% rise in total case volume with a 3.2% increase in independent restaurant case volume. Net sales climbed 6.2% to $9.5 billion, while gross profit saw a 4.8% boost reaching $1.7 billion. The net income for this period was recorded at $66 million, and adjusted EBITDA surged by 13.7% to $441 million.

news.headline: Sally Beauty Holdings reports $938 million in net sales for Q1 fiscal 2025, up 0.7% from previous year.
news.summary: Sally Beauty Holdings, Inc. reported its financial outcomes for the first quarter ending December 31, 2024. With consolidated net sales totaling $938 million, there was a 0.7% boost from the previous year. This growth included 60 basis points of negative impact from foreign currency fluctuations. As a leader in professional hair color, the company is hosting a conference call at 7:30 a.m. Central Time today to address these results and its overall performance in Fiscal 2025 Q1.

news.headline: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) to present at CAGNY Conference on Feb 19, 2025, at 3:00 p.m. ET. Webcast available on investors.kenvue.com.
news.summary: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) shared today that their executives Thibaut Mongon, Paul Ruh, and Charmaine England are scheduled to speak at the Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) Conference on February 19, 2025, at 3:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Those interested can watch a live webcast of the event on investors.kenvue.com and catch a replay on the same website after the conference. Kenvue Inc. is a prominent company in the field.

news.headline: Eaton (NYSE: ETN) to host 2025 investor conference on March 11, 2025, 2-5:30 pm Eastern time in Dublin.
news.summary: Eaton (ETN), a leading intelligent power management company, has revealed plans to conduct its 2025 investor conference on March 11, 2025, from 2 p.m. to 5:30 p.m. EST. The conference aims to address business prospects with securities analysts and institutional investors. Key presenters at the event will include Craig Arnold, the chairman and chief executive officer; Paulo Ruiz, the president and chief operating officer; and Olivier Leonetti, the executive.

news.headline: Trump: Today is the big one: reciprocal tariffs.
Molson Coors' shares soar as earnings exceed expectations and forecast projects continued growth.
Comstock Fuels & Gresham’s Eastern finalize commercial licensing agreement in Pakistan for SAF & renewable fuels.
news.summary: Secures agreement in Pakistan for commercial licensing of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) and other renewable fuels. The deal solidifies the company's presence in the region and opens up opportunities for growth. The agreement covers the production and distribution of SAF, with an initial target of producing X amount of fuel per year. This partnership is a significant step towards sustainable energy practices in Pakistan, aiming to reduce carbon emissions by X% in the aviation industry. The company is excited to expand its renewable fuel portfolio and contribute to a greener future in the country.

news.headline: Postal Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: PSTL) will report Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 26, 2025, with 2,000+ USPS properties.
news.summary: In Cedarhurst, New York, on February 13, 2025, Postal Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: PSTL) disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the duration concluded by December 31, 2024, on February 26, 2025, subsequent to the market's closure. The Company operates as an internally managed real estate investment trust, possessing and supervising more than 2,000 properties rented primarily to the United States Postal Service (USPS). These properties include a variety of sites from last-mile post offices to industrial facilities.

news.headline: TELUS reports strong Q4 2024 results with 328,000 total customer growth, driven by demand for bundled services and broadband networks.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, the company experienced a significant increase in their total Mobile and Fixed customer base, recording a growth of 328,000 customers. This growth can be attributed to the high demand for their diverse range of bundled services in both the Mobility and Fixed sectors. The company's success can also be linked to the quality and widespread coverage of their broadband networks provided by TELUS. The increase in customers demonstrates the strong performance of the company in meeting the needs and demands of consumers.

news.headline: IGT extends contract with Tennessee Education Lottery for 9 years, starting June 2027.NYSE: IGT.
news.summary: In London on February 13, 2025, International Game Technology PLC (IGT) revealed that its subsidiary, IGT Global Solutions Corporation, has inked a significant nine-year contract extension with the Tennessee Education Lottery (TEL). This extension, commencing in June 2027, solidifies the partnership between the two entities.

news.headline: Brookfield Corporation announces record-breaking results for 2024.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted that the country's unemployment rate has reached an alarming 8.5%, with over 2 million individuals currently out of work. This figure represents a significant increase compared to the same period last year. Furthermore, the report also noted that the economy grew by only 1.2% in the last fiscal quarter, falling short of the projected 2% growth. Analysts attribute this underperformance to various factors, including global market trends and domestic policy issues. As a result, government officials are facing mounting pressure to implement effective measures to address the rising unemployment rate and stimulate economic growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Retail market in China set to grow by $1.42 trillion from 2025-2029, driven by premiumization of products and AI advancements, progressing at 8.8% CAGR - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent analysis, it was identified that artificial intelligence (AI) is playing a significant role in reshaping the retail sector in China. Over the period from 2025 to 2029, the market is projected to witness a substantial growth, with an increase estimated at USD 1.42 trillion. This growth is expected to maintain a steady pace, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 8.8% throughout the forecasted duration. This indicates the transformative impact of AI technologies on the retail industry in China, highlighting a promising future for market development and evolution.

news.headline: Onity Group Inc. (NYSE: ONIT) announces full-year and fourth quarter 2024 results in West Palm Beach, Florida.
news.summary: The company Onity Group Inc. (NYSE: ONIT) revealed its full-year and fourth quarter 2024 financial outcomes and delivered a business update in West Palm Beach, Florida on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: Metaplanet secures $25.9M bond to grow Bitcoin holdings, targeting 21,000 BTC by 2026 without interest.
news.summary: A company based in Japan has secured $25.9 million through zero-interest bonds as part of its strategy to increase its Bitcoin holdings. The firm aims to acquire 21,000 BTC by the year 2026 through this fundraising effort.

news.headline: Recordati's 2024 revenue rose by 12.4%, EBITDA by 12.5%, and adjusted net income by 8.4%. Sales targets for rare disease products increased.
news.summary: Recordati has reported promising preliminary results for the full year of 2024, with a notable increase in key financial metrics. Revenue saw a robust growth of 12.4%, while EBITDA surged by 12.5%. Adjusted net income also saw a positive growth of 8.4%. Furthermore, the company announced an increase in peak year sales targets for their key rare diseases products. Overall, these results indicate a strong performance and growth trajectory for Recordati in the current financial year.

news.headline: Dining out market to grow by $1.184 trillion from 2025-2029 with AI influencing, says Technavio - NYC report.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI technology reveals promising growth in the dining out market, which is projected to increase by USD 1.184 trillion between 2025 and 2029. This growth is expected to advance steadily at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10% throughout the forecast period, as indicated by insights from Technavio.

news.headline: GE Healthcare exceeded profit predictions with a 2% sales increase.
CharmHealth launches marketplace, connecting healthcare stakeholders. Includes providers, patients, entrepreneurs, developers.
news.summary: A new marketplace called CharmHealthHub has been launched in Pleasanton, California. This platform is designed for the entire healthcare community including providers, practice groups, patients, entrepreneurs, developers, and VCs. It aims to bring together various stakeholders within the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Global Thermal Release Tape Market to reach US$4,282.5 million by 2035, growing at 5.4% CAGR, driven by demand from electronics industries. Key players are Sekisui Chemical, tesa tape, Avery Dennison, 3M, and more.
news.summary: The global Thermal Release Tape Market is projected to reach a valuation of US$ 2,531.0 million in 2025 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.4% during the forecast period of 2025 to 2035. Factors such as increased production of printed circuit boards and electronic devices are propelling market growth. Industries like automotive, aerospace, and medical are driving demand due to the tapes' ability to withstand extreme temperatures and chemical resistance. The market is anticipated to hit US$ 4,282.5 million by 2035 with an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 1,751.5 million. North America is predicted to hold a 29.6% market share in 2035. Key players in the market include Sekisui Chemical Co., Ltd., tesa tape Inc., Avery Dennison Corporation, 3M Company, Scapa Group plc, The Tape Group, Lohmann Rauscher GmbH Co. KG, Lintec Corporation, CBC Co., Ltd., Shurtape Technologies, LLC, Ideon Technologies, Inc., and Nitto Denko Avecia Inc.

news.headline: Global Hydrophobic Interaction Chromatography Market valued at $461.9 million in 2023 to reach $952.9 million by 2033, at 7.5% CAGR.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the "Hydrophobic Interaction Chromatography Market". In 2023, the market was valued at $461.9 million, with an expected growth to $952.9 million by 2033, at a CAGR of 7.5%. Key growth factors include increased R&D spending in biopharmaceuticals, rising demand for biologics & monoclonal antibodies, and adoption of biosimilars. However, challenges like lack of skilled workforce and high costs hinder market growth. Emerging markets and technological advancements in HIC present future opportunities. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
